audit_scope.authoritative_url_source: The public XML blog sitemap was treated as the complete migration candidate list for this pass.
audit_scope.method: Fetched all rendered post bodies and WordPress category assignments through the public WordPress REST API, matched each record to the sitemap by slug, and reviewed article body text, headings, opening, and closing content before assigning topics.
audit_scope.content_reviewed: All 108 sitemap posts, one record per URL.
audit_scope.exclusions: No remote writes, test executions, schema changes, or WordPress/Directus/n8n mutations were performed.

taxonomy_rules: One flat client-scoped blog_topics vocabulary; no hierarchy and no parallel tag system.
A post may have multiple topics, but each assigned topic must represent a substantial body subject rather than a passing mention or CTA.
Broad containers such as Resources, Our Services, Education, and How-To Articles are retired.
Featured becomes presentation state on blog_posts, not a topic.
Uncategorized is never migrated as a topic.
Prefer reusable reader-navigation concepts; do not create one-off topics for isolated content.
A post with no honest reusable fit remains unassigned and is reported in no_fit_posts.
Topic slugs should be unique per client, with a database or workflow check preventing a post from selecting another client's topics.

proposed_topics.name: Roof Leaks
proposed_topics.definition: Symptoms, causes, diagnosis, and immediate homeowner response to water intrusion.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use when leak detection or water entry is a primary subject; pair with Roof Repair or Roof Inspection only when those actions are substantial.

proposed_topics.name: Roof Repair
proposed_topics.definition: Repair decisions, methods, expectations, and targeted remediation of roof defects.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use for articles materially about fixing an existing problem, not every article that mentions repair.

proposed_topics.name: Roof Replacement
proposed_topics.definition: Replacement timing, process, planning, scope, and decision-making.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use when full replacement is a primary decision or process, not merely a CTA.

proposed_topics.name: Roof Maintenance
proposed_topics.definition: Preventive upkeep, cleaning, small interventions, and ongoing roof care.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use for repeatable care that preserves roof condition; do not use merely because maintenance is mentioned.

proposed_topics.name: Roof Inspections
proposed_topics.definition: Professional or homeowner inspection cadence, checklists, documentation, and condition assessment.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use when inspection is a central method, service, or decision step.

proposed_topics.name: Roof Lifespan
proposed_topics.definition: Expected service life, premature failure, longevity factors, and life-extension strategy.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use for content whose primary promise is how long a roof lasts or why roofs reach or miss expected life.

proposed_topics.name: Hurricane Preparation
proposed_topics.definition: Actions taken before hurricanes or tropical storms to improve roof and household readiness.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use for pre-storm preparation; use Storm Damage for post-event damage and response.

proposed_topics.name: Storm Damage
proposed_topics.definition: Roof damage caused by hurricanes, wind, rain, hail, or debris and the post-event response.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use when damage or post-storm action is primary, not for generic seasonal preparation.

proposed_topics.name: Insurance & Claims
proposed_topics.definition: Roof documentation, coverage readiness, claim steps, adjuster roles, and insurer interactions.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use only when insurance or claims receive substantive treatment; legal and policy content must be freshness-reviewed.

proposed_topics.name: Roofing Costs
proposed_topics.definition: Pricing, budgeting, financing, bids, total ownership cost, and return on investment.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use where cost or financial value is a primary reader intent.

proposed_topics.name: Choosing a Roofer
proposed_topics.definition: Contractor vetting, credentials, contracts, crews, estimates, ethics, and red flags.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use for homeowner selection guidance, not ordinary company promotion.

proposed_topics.name: Roofing Materials
proposed_topics.definition: Cross-material selection, comparisons, properties, and general material education.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use for articles comparing several material families; use a material-specific topic for focused articles.

proposed_topics.name: Asphalt Shingles
proposed_topics.definition: Asphalt shingle systems, grades, appearance, lifespan, performance, and comparisons.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use only when asphalt shingles are a substantial subject, not when shingles are mentioned generically.

proposed_topics.name: Metal Roofing
proposed_topics.definition: Standing seam, exposed-fastener, metal shingle, and other metal roof systems.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use for metal-focused history, selection, comparison, cost, performance, or maintenance.

proposed_topics.name: Tile Roofing
proposed_topics.definition: Concrete and clay tile performance, lifespan, value, maintenance, and selection.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use for tile-focused content; general multi-material articles remain under Roofing Materials.

proposed_topics.name: Roof Components & Ventilation
proposed_topics.definition: Roof anatomy, geometry, vents, attic airflow, and component function.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use for system components and ventilation; use Gutters & Drainage when runoff management is the dominant intent.

proposed_topics.name: Gutters & Drainage
proposed_topics.definition: Gutters, downspouts, runoff paths, drainage failures, and related property damage.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use for water management at and beyond the roof edge.

proposed_topics.name: Energy-Efficient Roofing
proposed_topics.definition: Heat control, reflective systems, insulation interactions, solar considerations, and environmentally responsible roofing.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use where energy performance or sustainability is a primary subject.

proposed_topics.name: Roof Style & Curb Appeal
proposed_topics.definition: Color, architectural fit, exterior coordination, appearance, and resale presentation.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use when visual selection or curb appeal is a core reader intent.

proposed_topics.name: Roofing Safety & Standards
proposed_topics.definition: Building codes, installation standards, fasteners, certifications, safe practices, and quality controls.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use for substantive technical, regulatory, or safety guidance; do not recreate the former catch-all Your Safety category.

proposed_topics.name: Roofing Warranties
proposed_topics.definition: Manufacturer and workmanship warranty scope, exclusions, durability, and provider viability.
proposed_topics.inclusion_guidance: Use only when warranty mechanics or risk are a major subject.

retired_terms.name: Education
retired_terms.reason: Generic container that describes editorial intent rather than subject matter; remap each post by body.

retired_terms.name: How-To Articles
retired_terms.reason: Format label, not a subject taxonomy; how-to posts receive subject topics.

retired_terms.name: Our Services
retired_terms.reason: Broad service container; use specific subject topics.

retired_terms.name: Resources
retired_terms.reason: Broad content container with no useful filter intent.

retired_terms.name: Featured
retired_terms.reason: Presentation state belongs in a blog_posts.featured boolean, not the topic taxonomy.

retired_terms.name: Uncategorized
retired_terms.reason: A missing editorial decision should not become a public topic.

retired_terms.name: Recipes
retired_terms.reason: One off-topic recipe does not justify a client blog topic; exclude or relocate that post.

retired_terms.name: Storms
retired_terms.reason: Split pre-event preparation from post-event damage according to article body.

retired_terms.name: Your Safety
retired_terms.reason: Historical catch-all; remap to hurricane, standards, leaks, repair, or contractor selection as appropriate.

retired_terms.name: Roof Maintenance
retired_terms.reason: Keep the useful name while removing service-oriented slug baggage.

retired_terms.name: Roof Repair
retired_terms.reason: Keep the useful name with a clean subject slug.

retired_terms.name: Roof Replacement
retired_terms.reason: Keep the useful name with a clean subject slug.

retired_terms.name: Warranty
retired_terms.reason: Clarify the subject when displayed across many client-scoped vocabularies.
